ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size specifications */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender to which the size applies */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group to which the size applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., SHOULDER, SLEEVE LENGTH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement process */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement for the specified size */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES size_chart_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regional sizing differences */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the size chart */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit test */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the fit test */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results from the fit test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the fit test */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the size chart used in the fit test */,
  "tested_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who conducted the fit test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fit test was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fit test record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_tests_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES size_chart_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_tests_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_tests_tested_by FOREIGN KEY ("tested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the returned product */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return (e.g., too small, too large) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID of the customer who returned the product */,
  "reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the return reason (e.g., TS, TL for Too Small, Too Large) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the return record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size relation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size applicable to the product */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the size chart used for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product-size relation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product-size relation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES size_chart_versions ("version_id")
)
